definition: A solution or remedy for all difficulties or diseases.
Wicked, villainous, or criminal in nature.
The state or situation of being alone, often by choice and peacefully.
Vivacious and enthusiastic; bubbling with liveliness.
The lowest or most unsuccessful point in a situation.
Cheerful and full of energy; overflowing with enthusiasm.
A strong desire to travel and explore the world.
Full of or shedding light; bright or shining, especially in the dark.
The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way.
Sweet or musical; pleasant to hear.
Denoting a period of time in the past that was idyllically happy and peaceful.
Too great or extreme to be expressed or described in words.
The realization that each passer-by is living a life as vivid and complex as your own.
Lasting for a very short time; fleeting and transient.
